_meta.description: Membership tiers, benefits, and FAQs - staff can update prices, benefits, and FAQ content
_meta.staffInstructions: This file controls membership offerings on the website. Update prices annually in January. Update FAQs as policies change.

fieldGuide.id: Unique identifier for the tier (lowercase, no spaces)
fieldGuide.name: Display name of the tier
fieldGuide.price: Annual price in whole DOLLARS (not cents for membership)
fieldGuide.badge: Emoji or icon for the tier
fieldGuide.benefits: Array of benefit strings - be specific about what's included
fieldGuide.href: Link to signup - usually the NeonCRM URL
fieldGuide.featured: Set true for one tier to highlight it

rules: Membership prices are in DOLLARS (unlike events which use cents)
Keep benefits lists to 5-8 items for readability
Only one tier should have featured: true
Update NeonCRM URLs if the system changes
commonMistakes: Mixing up dollars vs cents (membership uses dollars)
Making benefit lists too long (hard to compare)
Forgetting to update the comparison table when changing benefits

_aiRules.description: Rules for AI assistants editing this file
beforeEditing: ALWAYS verify changes with user before committing
prohibited: Do NOT make changes without user awareness
Do NOT change tier prices without explicit approval
Do NOT modify NeonCRM URLs without verification

tiers.name: Governor's Circle
tiers.tagline: Lead the preservation of Tennessee's founding story
benefits: Private tour for up to 10 guests

tiers.name: Frontier Family
tiers.tagline: Perfect for families exploring history together

tiers.name: Explorer's Pass
benefits: Unlimited free admission for two adults

tiers.name: Settler's Pass
tiers.tagline: Your journey into history begins here
benefits: Unlimited free admission for one adult

faqs.question: What benefits do I receive as a member?
faqs.answer: All members receive unlimited free admission, gift shop discounts, early event registration, and our quarterly newsletter. Higher tiers include additional benefits like guest passes, reciprocal admission at partner sites, and exclusive events.

faqs.question: What is the Member Passport?
faqs.answer: The Member Passport is a collectible booklet where you can collect stamps at each visit and during special events. It's a fun way to track your history journey and makes a great keepsake.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade my membership?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can upgrade at any time by paying the difference between your current tier and the new tier. Contact us or visit during your next trip.

faqs.question: Is my membership tax-deductible?
faqs.answer: Yes, your membership is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. The portion representing the fair market value of benefits received is not deductible. You'll receive a tax acknowledgment letter.

faqs.question: How do I use my membership?
faqs.answer: Simply present your membership card at the admissions desk. If you don't have your card, we can look you up by name or email. Your membership is valid for one year from the date of purchase.

faqs.question: How do I renew my membership?
faqs.answer: We'll send you a renewal reminder about 30 days before your membership expires. You can renew online, by phone, or in person. Renew early to avoid any gaps in your benefits.

faqs.question: What's the difference between membership tiers?
faqs.answer: Each tier builds on the one below it. Individual and dual memberships are great for solo visitors or couples. Frontier Family covers your whole household. Patriot Pass and Governor's Circle offer additional perks and recognition for those who want to support our mission more deeply.
